title: BingX - Rekt
relevance_summary: Hot wallet compromise leading to multi-chain withdrawal with compromised validator signatures

prevention.rule: Block any tx that involves cross-chain bridge withdrawal from known compromised validator addresses.

monitoring_rules: BLOCK ANY TX THAT INVOLVES CROSS-CHAIN BRIDGE WITHDRAWAL FROM KNOWN COMPROMISED VALIDATOR ADDRESSES
summary: BingX suffered a multi-chain hot wallet compromise resulting in $44.7 million in losses. A guard could have prevented this by blocking cross-chain bridge withdrawals from known compromised validator addresses.
